title: Advocacy * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Advocacy * Disabilities Issues 8 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disabilities Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARC LANE COUNTY THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and services to help people who experience intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Individuals with intellectual and/or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 343-5256 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC UMATILLA COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides connections to resources such as case management services, assistance with advocacy, disability awareness training, education, recreational programs, and vocational training. 215 W Orchard Avenue Hermiston, OR 978381738 Eligibility: Individuals who have intellectual and developmental disabilities and their families Hours: Monday 9am-noon Email (541) 567-7615 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides practical and emotional support services to children and their families who have been affected by childhood cancer. Families are served from diagnosis through treatment, and bereavement through monthly support groups, family activities and events, teen groups, emergency funds, scholarships, and food pantries and meal programs at local hospitals. 10070 SW Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway Suite 360 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Children ages 0-21 who currently have or have had cancer and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 719-4244 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and limited legal services to people with disabilities. DRO's individual advocacy focuses on providing callers with information and materials about their rights to help them advocate for themselves. Occasionally, Disability Rights Oregon will engage in litigation to protect the rights of Oregonians under applicable federal and state laws. DRO does not provide the following services: -Representation in criminal or family law matters -Help finding employment, housing, or financial assistance -Case management -Assistance for short term disability issues -Transportation to doctor's office -Applying for or appealing denial of Social Security disability benefits -Estates and trusts -Becoming the guardian of a person with a disability -Out-of-state issues -Workers' compensation -Medical malpractice or personal injury -Consumer or bankruptcy issues -Anything that is not the wish of the person with the disability 900 SW 5th Avenue Suite 1800 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Individuals with disabilities who have legal issues related to their disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 243-2081 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK MID-OREGON REGION OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 300 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK NORTH OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 7110 SW Fir Loop Suite 160 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK SOUTH OREGON REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 72A Centennial Loop Suite 150 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE ARC OREGON GUARDIANSHIP, ADVOCACY, AND PLANNING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guardianship, advocacy, and health care advocacy services for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities. Through a testamentary nomination in their will, families can plan for services upon their passing. GAPS also accepts referrals for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities that have no one else in their lives and need protection from abusive or neglectful situations. 2405 Front Street NE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Adults with intellectual or developmental disabilities. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 581-2726 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC LANE COUNTY THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY ARC UMATILLA COUNTY ARC UMATILLA COUNTY CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON THE ARC OREGON GUARDIANSHIP, ADVOCACY, AND PLANNING SERVICES
